## Checklist
- [ ] I updated documentation for all behavior/setup changes.
- [ ] I updated the relevant phase document in `docs/phases/`.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if user-facing setup changed.
- [ ] I verified no file exceeds 500 lines (or documented an explicit exception).
- [ ] I ran local validation checks (`make validate`).
- [ ] I did not introduce hidden fallback behavior.
